zh.lifeSummary: Graf Amadeus von Neuenburg和Jordanna von Arberg至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1285年。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Graf Amadeus von Neuenburg和Jordanna von Arberg至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1285年。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Amadeus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval Latin name meaning ‘love God’, probably originally a deliberate calque of Greek Theophilos ( see Theophilus ). The name was traditional in the royal house of Savoy; bearers include the Blessed Amadeus IX , Duke of Savoy ( 1435–72 ). In the English-speaking world it is famous chiefly as the second name of the composer Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart ( 1756–91 ), for whom it was a Latin version of German Gottlieb . It is occasionally bestowed by music-loving parents in his honour.

en.lifeSummary: Graf Amadeus von Neuenburg had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Jordanna von Arberg. He died in 1285.

fr.lifeSummary: Graf Amadeus von Neuenburg a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Jordanna von Arberg. Il est décédé en 1285.

it.lifeSummary: Graf Amadeus von Neuenburg lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Jordanna von Arberg. Morì nel 1285.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Amadeus von NeuenburgはJordanna von Arbergとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1285年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Amadeus von Neuenburg(은)는 Jordanna von Arberg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1285년 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: У Graf Amadeus von Neuenburg был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Jordanna von Arberg. Он умер в 1285 г.

es.lifeSummary: Graf Amadeus von Neuenburg tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Jordanna von Arberg. Murió en 1285.
